summary: Iteration 27 - Socket.IO, Push Notifications, Admin User Management Testing Complete. 15/15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: Socket.IO LIVE indicator, Push notification bell toggle, Admin Users tab with search/ban/coin adjustment.

backend.api_root_socket_status: PASS - GET /api returns socket status with connected_clients and server_active fields
backend.subscribe_with_auth: PASS - POST /api/notifications/subscribe works with valid auth
backend.unsubscribe_with_auth: PASS - POST /api/notifications/unsubscribe works with valid auth
backend.admin_users_list: PASS - GET /api/admin/users returns paginated user list (37 users)
backend.admin_user_detail: PASS - GET /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns user details with stats
backend.admin_adjust_coins: PASS - POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/adjust-coins adjusts coins and logs transaction
backend.admin_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for admin
backend.player_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for player

frontend.push_toggle_bell: PASS - data-testid='push-toggle' bell icon visible on HomePage
frontend.admin_nav_users: PASS - data-testid='admin-nav-users' tab in admin bottom nav
frontend.admin_users_tab: PASS - data-testid='admin-users-tab' renders with user list
frontend.user_rows: PASS - 15 user rows displayed with data-testid='user-row-*'
frontend.user_detail_modal: PASS - Click on user row opens modal with data-testid='user-detail-name'
frontend.ban_toggle_button: PASS - data-testid='ban-toggle' button in user detail modal

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in admin.py: admin_adjust_coins was using 'coins' field instead of 'coins_balance' - corrected to use coins_balance
Fixed frontend/.env formatting issue - missing newline between ENABLE_HEALTH_CHECK and REACT_APP_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
Socket.IO integration working correctly with path '/api/socket.io/'
socketStore.js properly connects on PlayerApp mount and joins home room
HomePage.jsx correctly shows LIVE/OFFLINE indicator based on isConnected state
Push notification hook (usePushNotifications.js) properly handles subscription/unsubscription
AdminUsersTab.jsx has all required data-testid attributes for testing
UserDetailModal shows user stats, ban toggle, and coin adjustment controls
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified Socket.IO, Push Notifications, and Admin User Management features. Key findings: (1) Socket.IO uses path '/api/socket.io/' and combined_app wraps FastAPI, (2) GET /api returns socket status with connected_clients and server_active, (3) VAPID keys are in both frontend and backend .env files, (4) Push notification endpoints require auth except vapid-public-key, (5) Admin Users tab at /api/admin/users with search, pagination, ban/unban, coin adjustment, (6) Fixed coins_balance field name bug in admin_adjust_coins endpoint, (7) All data-testid attributes present for UI testing.

features_verified.socket_status_api: VERIFIED - GET /api returns socket.connected_clients and socket.server_active
features_verified.socket_status_ui: VERIFIED - LIVE/OFFLINE indicator on HomePage with data-testid='socket-status'
features_verified.push_bell_toggle: VERIFIED - Bell icon toggle on HomePage with data-testid='push-toggle'
features_verified.admin_user_detail: VERIFIED - GET /api/admin/users/{id} returns user with stats
features_verified.admin_users_tab_ui: VERIFIED - Users tab in admin nav with full user management UI

bugs_fixed.issue: admin_adjust_coins endpoint was using 'coins' field instead of 'coins_balance'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed db query and update to use 'coins_balance' field

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing newline between ENABLE_HEALTH_CHECK and REACT_APP_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY
